fear: Being put in the calaboose — he has a prior vagrancy record in DuPage County and knows a sworn complaint would mean remand.
name: Silas Greer
voice: Minimal, careful, always watching the nearest exit — answers in the fewest words that will satisfy the question.
secrets: He still has three of the five dollars on him — Voss paid him two dollars up front and owes him three more, which he has not yet collected.
He recognized Edgar Williams at the site because he had seen him before, at a hardware supply house in Chicago where Voss also had an account.
knowledge: He tightened the brake collar on the rotary table between midnight and 2 AM using a pipe wrench he returned to the tool crib.
He left the lower office door unlocked as instructed but did not enter the office himself — he does not know about the torn logbook pages.
He saw Edgar Williams at the site after midnight, which surprised him because he thought only Voss's people were supposed to be there.
publicFace: A lean, quiet man in his thirties who has been on the crew for three weeks, described by the foreman as a reliable hand with no particular specialty. He is rarely seen speaking to anyone.
trustLogic: Opens up only if convinced that Voss has already implicated him — at that point, he will trade everything he knows for a guarantee that the vagrancy record stays out of the sworn complaint.
privateGoal: To collect his five dollars from Voss, stay invisible, and be gone on the morning CBQ freight run before anyone connects him to the tampered equipment.

aggressionProfile.fleeStyle: Runs — directly toward the CBQ freight yard, knowing the terrain and the gaps in the perimeter fence.
aggressionProfile.chaseStyle: Fast, low, uses the debris piles and open trenches as obstacles — he has clearly thought about this route.
aggressionProfile.mildPressure: Says he was checking the equipment as part of his night rounds and that the foreman can confirm his assignment.
aggressionProfile.breakingPoint: He will never name Voss unless he believes Voss has already named him. Then he will give everything.
aggressionProfile.fleeCondition: If the Night Marshal moves to place him under remand without first hearing his offer to trade information.
aggressionProfile.heavyPressure: Goes completely silent, looks at the ground, and waits — he has been questioned by law enforcement before and knows that talking is the mistake.
aggressionProfile.capturedBehavior: Immediately offers the information about Edgar Williams at the site in exchange for the vagrancy record being kept out of the complaint.
